title: Change - Canada.ca
content:
Making changes online using CRA's electronic services is fast, convenient, and easy. Select the item you wish to change from the following list:
- GST/HST return and/or rebate
- T4 (payroll), T5 (investment), and other information returns and slips My Business Account : business owners Represent a Client : employees or representatives acting on behalf of a business
- My Business Account : business owners
- Represent a Client : employees or representatives acting on behalf of a business
- T1 (self-employed/sole proprietorship) My Account : self-employed/sole proprietorship (individuals) Represent a Client : employees or representatives acting on behalf of a business ReFILE : EFILE service providers making online T1 adjustments
- My Account : self-employed/sole proprietorship (individuals)
- Represent a Client : employees or representatives acting on behalf of a business
- ReFILE : EFILE service providers making online T1 adjustments
- Business profile - address, banking and operating name information My Business Account : business owners Represent a Client : employees or representatives acting on behalf of a business
- My Business Account : business owners
- Represent a Client : employees or representatives acting on behalf of a business
- Transfer payments My Business Account : business owners Represent a Client : employees or representatives acting on behalf of a business
- My Business Account : business owners
- Represent a Client : employees or representatives acting on behalf of a business
- Authorizations for representatives My Business Account : business owners My Account : self-employed/sole proprietorship (individuals)
- My Business Account : business owners
- My Account : self-employed/sole proprietorship (individuals)

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
